themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents capable of autonomous actions and decision-making in research workflows, including autonomous agents for various tasks and agentic AI frameworks.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content related to AI tools that assist developers in writing, reviewing, and debugging code, including LLMs used for code generation and analysis.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles detailing specific AI tools designed to aid researchers in various stages of the research process, from data collection to analysis and insights.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Research and discussions surrounding the capabilities, risks, and applications of AI chatbots, including their interactions and potential societal impacts.

themes.name: AI summarization insights
themes.description: Content about AI's ability to condense large amounts of information into concise summaries and extract key insights from various data sources.

themes.name: AI testing automation
themes.description: Articles discussing the use of AI to automate testing processes, improve test efficiency, and ensure the quality of software and systems.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Discussions and studies on how AI is affecting the job market, including job displacement, skill requirements, and the future of work.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Content focusing on AI's application in analyzing sentiment from customer feedback, reviews, and other forms of qualitative data.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Articles exploring the use of AI to enhance or automate usability testing processes, identify design issues, and gather user feedback.

themes.name: AI qualitative research
themes.description: The application of AI in qualitative research methods, such as analyzing interviews, text data, and open-ended responses.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
